label: VE2
evidence: Resolved from Supplementary Table 3 of the atlas paper (10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x), which lists endothelial subclusters as VE1, VE2, etc., with VE2 annotated as 'Vascular Endothelial 2 (VE2)' in both main and supplemental figure legends and tables. Context is skin, and cluster naming directly follows 'VE' for Vascular Endothelial in the fine granularity annotation.
